questions.question: Compare and contrast the chalk and talk method with the PowerPoint presentation method in terms of engaging students and conveying complex concepts in graph theory. Provide reasons to support your answer. (10 marks)
What are the advantages of using PowerPoint presentations over the chalk and talk method in teaching graph theory, particularly in terms of visual aids and organization of content? (8 marks)

A teacher uses the chalk and talk method to explain graph coloring to students. Describe the steps the teacher should take to ensure that students understand the concept and are able to apply it to different types of graphs. (12 marks)
